title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1063 - Majority vote required, when
text:
351.1063.  Majority vote required, when. — The board shall take action by the affirmative vote of the majority of directors present at a duly held meeting at which a quorum is present, unless otherwise provided in sections 351.1000 to 351.1228, the articles, or bylaws.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
